text.en: Can attack directly. You can only use each of the following effects of "Alligator's Sword Dragon Knight" once per turn. If this card is in your hand: You can reveal 1 other card in your hand that mentions "Dark Time Wizard"; Special Summon this card. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add up to 2 Spells/Traps with different names from each other that mention "Dark Time Wizard" from your Deck to your hand, then discard 1 card.
